
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Horse|kanji=戊午|romaji=tsuchinoe uma|onyomi=bogo|p=wùwǔ|w=wu-wu|mi=u⁵⁵ u²¹|y=mou6 ng5|j=mou6 ng5|ci=mɐu ŋo|mc=məu ŋo|oc-bs=mə ŋaʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Horse also known as 戊午''' (tsuchinoeuma, bodonouma, bogo) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}.

It is the 55th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kihitsu|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihitsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Horse|ja|午|1=wǔ|lt=Horse (午)|2=ja|3=午|1=Horse (zodiac)|lt=Horse (午)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse|13=User:Immanuelle/Horse (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16683439}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a generating relationship ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, i.e. Fire generates Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Horse (戊午)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùwǔ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 ng5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-uma
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-uma
***Onyomi 1: bogo
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muo (무오)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Ngọ

==Years of Yang Earth Horse==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 58 when divided by 60 is a year of Bokugo ({{ill|Year|en|Year|qid=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}}).
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Bokugo (戊午の年)'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 58|en|AD 58|qid=Q31303|lt=58 AD|1=AD 58}}
* {{ill|AD 118|en|AD 118|qid=Q30003|lt=118 AD|1=AD 118}}
* {{ill|178|en|178|qid=Q33179|lt=178 AD|1=178}}
* {{ill|238|en|238|qid=Q30058|lt=238 AD|1=238}}
* {{ill|298|en|298|qid=Q33568|lt=298 AD|1=298}}
* {{ill|358|en|358|qid=Q47943|lt=358 AD|1=358}}
* {{ill|418|en|418|qid=Q32001|lt=418 AD|1=418}}
* {{ill|478|en|478|qid=Q30910|lt=478 AD|1=478}}
* {{ill|538|en|538|qid=Q32894|lt=538 AD|1=538}}
* {{ill|598|en|598|qid=Q31934|lt=598 AD|1=598}}
* {{ill|658|en|658|qid=Q30176|lt=658 AD|1=658}}
* {{ill|718|en|718|qid=Q23534|lt=718 AD|1=718}}
* {{ill|778|en|778|qid=Q30452|lt=778 AD|1=778}}
* {{ill|838|en|838|qid=Q23838|lt=838 AD|1=838}}
* {{ill|898|en|898|qid=Q24131|lt=898 AD|1=898}}
* {{ill|958|en|958|qid=Q23606|lt=958 AD|1=958}}
|
* {{ill|1018|en|1018|qid=Q19251|lt=1018 AD|1=1018}}
* {{ill|1078|en|1078|qid=Q19443|lt=1078 AD|1=1078}}
* {{ill|1138|en|1138|qid=Q19606|lt=1138 AD|1=1138}}
* {{ill|1198|en|1198|qid=Q19750|lt=1198 AD|1=1198}}
* {{ill|1258|en|1258|qid=Q5506|lt=1258 AD|1=1258}}
* {{ill|1318|en|1318|qid=Q5755|lt=1318 AD|1=1318}}
* {{ill|1378|en|1378|qid=Q6306|lt=1378 AD|1=1378}}
* {{ill|1438|en|1438|qid=Q6377|lt=1438 AD|1=1438}}
* {{ill|1498|en|1498|qid=Q6705|lt=1498 AD|1=1498}}
* {{ill|1558|en|1558|qid=Q6601|lt=1558 AD|1=1558}}
* {{ill|1618|en|1618|qid=Q6801|lt=1618 AD|1=1618}}
* {{ill|1678|en|1678|qid=Q7634|lt=1678 AD|1=1678}}
* {{ill|1738|en|1738|qid=Q6996|lt=1738 AD|1=1738}}
* {{ill|1798|en|1798|qid=Q7823|lt=1798 AD|1=1798}}
* {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858 AD|1=1858}}
* {{ill|1918|en|1918|qid=Q2094|lt=1918 AD|1=1918}}
* {{ill|1978|en|1978|qid=Q2483|lt=1978 AD|1=1978}}
|
* {{ill|2038 AD|ja|2038年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2038|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2038 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2098 AD|ja|2098年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2098|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2098 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2090年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect|1=2090s|qid=Q845811}}
* {{ill|2158 AD|ja|2158年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2158|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2158 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2218 AD|ja|2218年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2218|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2218 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2278 AD|ja|2278年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2278|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2278 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2338 AD|ja|2338年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2338|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2338 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2398 AD|ja|2398年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2398|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2398 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2458 AD|ja|2458年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2458|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2458 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2518 AD|ja|2518年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2518|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2518 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2578 AD|ja|2578年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2578|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2578 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2638 AD|ja|2638年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2638|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2638 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2698 AD|ja|2698年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2698|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2698 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2758 AD|ja|2758年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2758|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2758 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2818 AD|ja|2818年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2818|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2818 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2878 AD|ja|2878年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2878|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2878 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2938 AD|ja|2938年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2938|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2938 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2998 AD|ja|2998年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2998|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2998 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yang Earth Horse==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|May|en|May|qid=Q119|lt=May|1=May}} is designated as the Bokugo {{ill|Month|en|Month|qid=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|qid=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|qid=Q1190976|lt=Slightly Hot|1=Xiaoshu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Earth Horse==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Bokugo is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
Bokugo day is the gap day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}}.
==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Earth Horse|qq=ja|戊午|version=98658151|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q905011|af|Aardperd (astrologie)|cdo|Muô-ngū|de|Erde-Pferd|hak|Vú-ńg|ja|戊午|ko|무오|vi|Mậu Ngọ|za|Fouhngux|zh-min-nan|Bō͘-ngó͘|zh-yue|戊午|zh|戊午|zh-min-nan|Pêng-chún|zh-yue|丙戌|cdo|Bîng-cṳ̄de|nds|Feuer-Hundvi|de|Yang Earth Horse|fr|Cheval de terre|af|Vuurchond (astrologie)|de|Feuer-Hundeen|en|Fire Dog|fr|Chien de feushak|it|Bing-chṳ́id|ko|병술|vi|Bính Tuất|za|Bingceij|zh|丙戌|ar|Yang Earth Horse}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
